productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Navy Blue Top
description: CompositionNavy blue tube top made of 93% cotton and 7% elastane, with ruching at the sides on the hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroideryLadies, time to stock up your wardrobe with basic off-duty essentials like this top from united colors of benetton. Perfect for layering, or for a laid-back casual look styled minimalistically with jeans, this top is sure to become a love-forever piece in your closet. For the best layering effect, wear this under a structured blazer and interesting denims.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
